description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages "📦 build", "✅ unit-test", "🔐 security-test", "💻 integration-test", "📄 docs", and "🚀 deploy" using a variety of Docker images and services. In the build stage add a .suse job (tags: suse) that echoes "Hello SUSE", a FORTRAN job (image: alpine) that installs gfortran and musl-dev then compiles fortran/helloworld.f to fortran/helloworld and stores it as an artifact, an ada job (image: alpine) that installs gcc-gnat and musl-dev then builds ada/helloworld, an asm job (image: alpine) that installs nasm and binutils, assembles asm/helloworld.asm and links it to asm/helloworld, a "c++" job (image: alpine) that installs make and g++, runs make Hello in the c++ directory and executes ./Hello, a freeBASIC job (image: alpine) that installs build tools, downloads and installs FreeBASIC then compiles freebasic/helloworld.bas, a java:gradle job (image: gradle:latest) that runs ./gradlew build and ./gradlew run, a java:maven job (image: maven:latest) that runs mvn package and executes the resulting jar, a java:spring-boot job (image: maven:3.5-jdk-8-slim) that runs mvn package, an msbuild job (tags: windows) that invokes the Windows msbuild.exe on helloworld.csproj, a nodejs job (image: node:latest) that runs npm install, a docker job (image: docker:stable with service docker:dind) that logs in, builds and pushes a Docker image, a ruby job (image: docker:latest with service docker:dind) that logs in, builds and pushes a Ruby Docker image, an it:spring-boot job (image: maven:3.5-jdk-8-slim) that runs mvn integration-test, and a pages job (image: alpine:latest) that echoes a placeholder message, each publishing the specified artifact paths. In the security-test stage add a dast job (image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/zaproxy) that creates /zap/wrk, runs zap-baseline.py against the $website variable and copies gl-dast-report.json, a dependency_scanning job (image: docker:latest with service docker:dind) that computes SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION and runs the dependency‑scanning Docker image, and a sast job (image: registry.gitlab.com/allthethings/allthethings.gitlab.io/docker-maven:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with service docker:dind) that computes SAST_VERSION and runs the SAST Docker image, each storing their JSON reports as artifacts and allowing failure. In the deploy stage add a deploy-maven job (image: maven:3.3.9-jdk-8) that copies CI settings, substitutes CI_JOB_TOKEN and PROJECT_ID into settings and pom.xml, then runs mvn deploy; a deploy-node job (environment: nodeprod) that currently echoes a placeholder, and a trigger-downstream job that POSTs to a downstream pipeline via curl. In the unit-test stage add a test job that echoes "Foo" and a ut:spring-boot job (image: maven:3.5-jdk-8-slim) that runs mvn test. All jobs declare their artifact paths, allow_failure where noted, and use the defined variables and tags as shown.
